programme.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: The Bounty
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins delivers a brilliant portrayal as William Bligh, the sea captain who, in 1787, steered The Bounty on a 27,000-mile voyage into danger, chaos and madness, and whose first mate (Mel Gibson) lead a legendary mutiny against him..

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an "inescapable" Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars as an imprisoned officer who refuses to give up his fight against the Nazis, even from behind enemy lines. With the help of a young lieutenant (Colin Farrell), he risks everything to free his men and change the outcome of the war!

programme.title: Mulholland Falls
programme.desc: In the 1950s, an elite squad of detectives becomes embroiled in a conspiracy and faces a secret the U.S. government is determined to keep hidden.

programme.title: Dillinger
programme.desc: Starring Warren Oates, Ben Johnson, Cloris Leachman and Richard Dreyfuss, this electrifying crime saga about one of the most notorious gangsters of the 1930's sets the screen ablaze with explosive shootouts, daring escapes and stellar performances.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: In New York of the 1920s, the black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. Three rival gang leaders (Laurence Fishhburne, Tim Roth and Andy Garcia) battle for control of Harlem's urban power.

programme.title: Out Of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington is caught in a web of intrigue as he investigates the murder of a woman he was seeing...and all the evidence points to him.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: When police officer Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) learns that his childhood friend has become the prime suspect in a murder case, he also discovers that he's the only one who feels that his friend was framed to protect the local tourism business.

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Two killers are hiding where no one will ever find them...behind their badges! Tupac Shakur and James Belushi are two corrupt police detectives caught in a dangerous web of deceit in this gritty, smart and tough action thriller.

programme.title: The Mod Squad
programme.desc: Julie (Claire Danes), Pete (Giovanni Ribisi) and Linc (Omar Epps) are three problem teens headed to jail...until Captain Greer (Dennis Farina) offers them a deal to work for him and go undercover in the hip L.A. club scene. It’s a case that the cops can’t crack, but when Greer sends in his new task force – The Mod Squad – they quickly uncover a crime ring involving drugs, hookers...and dirty cops!

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Billy Crystal and Gregory Hines have winning chemistry as two of the Windy City's finest (and wildest) cops, out to nail Chicago's toughest criminal in this comedy thriller that asks the question, "How come the bad guys always drive the good cars?"
